_comment: FROZEN CONTRACT — the exact shape POST /v1/chat/completions returns. Base body is OpenAI-compatible (id prefixed 'homepilot-', object 'chat.completion', choices[].message). The x_attachments and x_directives fields are HomePilot enrichments appended ONLY when enriched mode is active AND they are non-empty — an unenriched response must NOT contain these keys. The 3D Avatar response adapter reads exactly these field names.
